subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! God willing, through the grace of the All-Merciful, mayest thou at all times be occupied with His remembrance and gladdened by His love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز حق انشاء الله بعنایت رحمن در جمیع احیان بذکرش مشغول باشی و بحبش مسرور
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @limits of the intellect, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
